allow: Bash(rm -f tailwind.config.js tailwind.config.ts postcss.config.js .eslintrc.cjs amplify.yml TESTING.md test-setup.html CLAUDE.md)

Bash(rm -f exchange_token.py find_token_type.py generate_zoho_token.py inspect_oauth.py setup_zoho_refresh_token.py simple_zoho_test.py test_zoho_auth.py test_current_user.py test_field_discovery.py test_jwt.py test_save_token_logging.py sdk_tokens.txt cookies.txt frontend_cookies.txt test_cookies.txt CURRENCY_SYSTEM_README.md ENHANCED_ZOHO_IMPLEMENTATION.md FLEXIBLE_SAVE_TOKEN_IMPLEMENTATION.md LIVE_SYNC_ENDPOINTS_SUMMARY.md PRODUCTION_READINESS_CHECKLIST.md SAVE_TOKEN_LOGGING_IMPLEMENTATION.md SDK_TROUBLESHOOTING_GUIDE.md CLAUDE.md backend.log server.log server_new.log)

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys, json; f=json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"path\",\"\"); exit(0 if not f.endswith((\".py\")) else 0)" && ruff check --fix "$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"path\",\"\"))")" 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"path\",\"\"))"); [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]] && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "PGPASSWORD=[^$]"; then echo "ERROR: Hardcoded credentials detected in command. Use environment variables instead."; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf /|rm -rf ~"; then echo "ERROR: Destructive rm detected. Aborting."; exit 1; fi'
